params.name: Silver Candlestick
params.description:
On Mar 29, 1817 AD, Valjean took the pair of silver candlesticks from a priest and decided to be a new man.
Valjean suffered nineteen years in prison for stealing a piece of bread. A kind priest took the helpless Valjean in after he was released from prison, but in order to make a living, Valjean repaid the priest's kindness by stealing the silverware from the priest's household. Unfortunately, while making his escape, Valjean was caught again by the police. But the priest, upon learning all …
